name: Cottage Cheese Egg Muffins
description: Fluffy, protein-packed egg muffins loaded with cottage cheese, feta, and fresh vegetables. Perfect grab-and-go breakfast for busy mornings.
steps: Preheat oven to 190°C. Grease a muffin tin.
Whisk together eggs, cottage cheese, oat flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Dice the red bell pepper, red onion, and green onion. Roughly chop the spinach.
Fold the vegetables, crumbled feta, and a pinch of dried basil into the egg mixture.
Pour evenly into 6 muffin cups (fills about ¾ full).
Bake for 20–22 minutes until set in the center and lightly golden on top.
Cool slightly before removing. Store in fridge up to 4 days.
notes: Store in fridge up to 4 days. Reheat in microwave for 30-45 seconds.
